details: The scheme “Atal Kisan Jyoti Yojana” launched by the Energy Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide concessional electricity to farmers through a flat rate power supply of ₹750/- per horsepower per year to metered agricultural pump consumers up to 10 horsepower.
benefits: Electricity Supply at Concessional Rate: Farmers having metered permanent agricultural pumps up to 10 horsepower are provided electricity at a flat rate of ₹750/- per horsepower per year.
eligibility: The applicant must be a farmer.
The applicant must be a permanent agricultural pump consumer.
The applicant must have a metered connection.
The applicant’s pump capacity should be up to 10 horsepower.

offline: The benefit will be automatically provided to eligible consumers.

documents_required: Any other document as required by the authority.

faqs.question: What is the objective of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to provide electricity at concessional rates to farmers in Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Who implements the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is implemented by the Horticulture and Food Processing Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to benefit from this scheme?
faqs.answer: Permanent metered agricultural pump consumers up to 10 horsepower are eligible for the benefit.

faqs.question: What is the rate of electricity supply under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Electricity is supplied at a flat rate of ₹750/- per horsepower per year.

faqs.question: What type of benefit is provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The benefit is provided in the form of a grant from the State Government.

faqs.question: Is this scheme available to all categories of farmers?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is available to all General category farmers having metered agricultural pumps up to 10 horsepower.

faqs.question: Is there any application process to avail of this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the benefit is automatically available to eligible consumers.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No, there is no application fee for this scheme.

faqs.question: Can farmers with more than 10 horsepower pumps apply for this benefit?
faqs.answer: No, only consumers with up to 10-horsepower pumps are eligible.

faqs.question: Who is the designated officer for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The distribution center in-charge is the designated officer.
